sentence: 自行车的车轮需要充气了。
pinyin: Zì xíng chē de chē lún xū yào chōng qì le.
english: The bicycle wheels need to be inflated.

sentence: 孩子的好奇心很强，什么都想试。
pinyin: Hái zi de hào qí xīn hěn qiáng, shén me dōu xiǎng shì.
english: Children have a strong sense of curiosity and want to try everything.

sentence: 医生说他的肝脏有些问题。
pinyin: Yī shēng shuō tā de gān zàng yǒu xiē wèn tí.
english: The doctor said there are some problems with his liver.

meaning: 1. to shrink (in the wash); 2. fig. to shrink (of profits etc)
sentence: 这件衬衫洗了之后缩水了。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn chèn shān xǐ le zhī hòu suō shuǐ le.
english: This shirt shrank after being washed.

sentence: 这所学校专门招收贫困家庭的子弟。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xué xiào zhuān mén zhāo shōu pín kùn jiā tíng de zǐ dì.
english: This school specifically enrolls children from impoverished families.
